label: exp3_colony_energy_scaled
comment: Experiment 3 colony-and-energy-scaled variant: same 30x30 cold-start world, food layout, pheromone strength, determinism, and obstacle corridors as the other Experiment 3 runs. This run increases the colony to 36 ants and keeps the higher energy budget of 300, staying below the assignment limit of 40 ants while testing whether more workers plus longer lifetime produce proportional gains or only congestion and redundant pheromone reinforcement.
hypothesis: With 36 ants and energy 300, the colony should reach the highest delivery frequency and broadest source coverage, but per-ant efficiency may be sublinear compared with the 24-ant energy-scaled run because many ants compete for the same corridor routes.
